description: Ticket commands — create and list ticket sequence numbers on XRPL accounts

userStories.title: ticket create command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to reserve ticket sequence numbers from the CLI so I can submit transactions out-of-order or in parallel without sequence conflicts.
acceptanceCriteria: Read TicketCreate docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/ticketcreate.md before implementing
Create src/commands/ticket.ts and register it in src/commands/index.ts and src/index.ts
xrpl ticket create with: --count <n> (required, positive integer 1-250)
CLI exits with error if --count is missing
CLI exits with error if --count is not an integer in range [1, 250]
tests/e2e/ticket/ticket.validation.test.ts: missing count, count=0, count=251, count=-1, non-integer count (no network)
tests/e2e/ticket/ticket.create.test.ts: create 1 ticket and verify via ticket list; create multiple tickets; --json, --dry-run

userStories.title: ticket list command
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to query the current ticket list for an account so I can see which sequence numbers are reserved.
acceptanceCriteria: xrpl ticket list <address> subcommand using account_objects RPC with type: 'ticket'
Default output: each ticket on its own line as 'Ticket sequence: <n>'
Shows 'No tickets.' if the account has none
Paginates if account_objects returns a marker (follow marker until exhausted)
tests/e2e/ticket/ticket.list.test.ts: create tickets, verify ticket list shows correct sequences; verify count matches --count; --json
